channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: No. 4 Penn State rallies back to beat USC 33-30 in overtime on TE Tyler Warren's record day
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Penn State traveled about 2,500 miles across the continent on its first road trip in the new Big Ten. The Nittany Lions then spent most of Saturday playing from behind against Southern California.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ewers returns as No. 1 Texas beats No. 18 Oklahoma 34-3 in 1st Red River Rivalry game as SEC members
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Quinn Ewers came back again for No. 1 Texas with another romp over Red River rival Oklahoma, this time in the Southeastern Conference.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Matt McCarty takes lead at Black Desert in his 2nd PGA Tour start
item.description: Matt McCarty took a two-stroke lead into the final round in his second PGA Tour start, shooting a 7-under 64 on Saturday in the inaugural Black Desert Championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Santa Clara women’s basketball coach Bill Carr resigns after eight seasons
item.description: The eight-year Santa Clara coach's surprising resignation comes a little more than two weeks before the new season begins.
item.dc:creator: Jon Becker, The Mercury News

item.title: North Carolina football player Tylee Craft dies from rare lung cancer at 23
item.description: CHAPEL HILL, N.C. (AP) — North Carolina football player Tylee Craft died Saturday morning from a rare form of lung cancer, coach Mack Brown said. Brown made the announcement in his postgame news conference following the Tar Heels’ loss to Georgia Tech. Craft was 23.
item.dc:creator: DOUG BONJOUR, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Kalen DeBoer reacts after Alabama narrowly avoids second straight SEC upset: 'Proud of these guys'
item.description: Despite entering Saturday's game as the overwhelming favorite, Alabama needed very second on the clock to secure a narrow win over South Carolina.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Breanna Stewart and the Liberty look to bounce back and even WNBA Finals series against the Lynx
item.description: The two-time MVP and her teammates will need to be at their best on Sunday when they face the Lynx in Game 2 of the best-of-five series.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers announce starting pitcher for NLCS Game 1
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers relied on spectacular pitching to escape the NL Division Series in five games against the San Diego Padres, and it's nearly time to see if those performances will carry over into the NL Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Carter soared quickly and Billups started slowly, but there's more than one road to the Hall of Fame
item.description: UNCASVILLE, Conn. (AP) — Vince Carter remembers the 2000 Slam Dunk Contest like it just happened, when he went from an up-and-comer to a full-fledged phenom. He had been the NBA Rookie of the Year the season before with Toronto and now he was a first-time All-Star.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Thomas hits grand slam off Skubal, Guardians down Tigers 7-3 to reach AL Championship Series
item.description: Lane Thomas hit a grand slam off Tarik Skubal and Cleveland beat the Detroit Tigers 7-3 in Game 5 of their AL Division Series, moving the Guardians into another postseason matchup against the Yankees.
item.dc:creator: Tom Withers, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Fight breaks out, abruptly ends Bay Area high school football game in second quarter
item.description: Both teams wanted to resume play, but referees called off the game following a scuffle that took about 10 minutes to get under control.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Holding a Super Bowl outside the US is a possibility, NFL Commissioner Goodell says
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The NFL's aggressive international growth plan could include holding a Super Bowl outside the United States for the first time, Commissioner Roger Goodell said Saturday. Goodell has shot down the idea in the past, but he told a fan forum in London that it's a possibility.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Jose Sharks place Celebrini on injured reserve
item.description: Macklin Celebrini will miss an unspecified amount of San Jose Sharks games, including tonight's game against the Anaheim Ducks
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Padres eliminated from playoffs after loss to Dodgers in Game 5 of NLDS
item.description: The Padres playoff road has come to an end after losing to the Los Angeles Dodgers 2-0 in Game 5 of the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Video: Wind tears roof off Tropicana Field, home of the Rays
item.description: Hurricane Milton made landfall in Siesta Key south of St. Petersburg, and while the city avoided some of the worst storm surges that doesn't mean the city avoided major effects from the storm.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, KTLA 5

item.title: Mets postseason tickets outsell Yankees on StubHub
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – The Mets and Yankees are both looking to make a run this postseason, but the Amazins are selling more tickets than the Bronx Bombers, according to StubHub. The Mets-Phillies National League Division Series was the best-selling series of the 2024 postseason on StubHub.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, PIX 11

item.title: Tatis homers again as the Padres beat the Dodgers 6-5 for a 2-1 NLDS lead
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Fernando Tatis Jr.'s towering two-run home run highlighted a six-run second inning, and the San Diego Padres held on to beat Shohei Ohtani and the rival Los Angeles Dodgers 6-5 on Tuesday night to take a 2-1 lead in a tense NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Whittingham not ready to hand keys over to Wilson yet
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With so much uncertainty as to when Cam Rising will be able to return at quarterback for the Utah football team, is there a point when head coach Kyle Whittingham will move on from Rising and hand the keys to the offense over to freshman Isaac Wilson? "There is
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bedard, Blackhawks embark on 2024-25 season Tuesday night in Utah
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Connor Bedard was one of the first players on the ice Monday. He was also one of the last to leave when practice was over. In many ways, Bedard is the same guy as he begins his second season with the Chicago Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Taylor Swift is back to watch Travis Kelce and the Chiefs with Eras Tour soon to resume
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Taylor Swift was back at Arrowhead Stadium on Monday night to see her boyfriend, Travis Kelce, and the Kansas City Chiefs play the New Orleans Saints after the pop superstar had missed the team's previous two games on the road.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Colorado Mesa football took down Goliath in program-changing win
item.description: It was an improbable 14-13 home upset victory over fourth-ranked 4-0 Colorado School of Mines. The same team that beat them 52-0 at Stocker Stadium a year ago.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Denver Broncos def. Las Vegas Raiders 34-18
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— In the second quarter, with the Broncos trailing 10-3 and defending the goal line, Gardner Minshew threw an interception to Patrick Surtain II, who returned it for a 100-yard touchdown. The pick-six was one of Surtain’s two interceptions on the night.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: PHOTOS: Padres and Dodgers face off in game 1 of the NLDS
item.description: The San Diego Padres are continuing their postseason journey in game one of the NLDS against the Dodgers after defeating the Braves earlier this week in the NL Wild Card Series.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5
